title: December
content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}} {{Month|December}} '''December''' is the twelfth month of the year in the [[Wikipedia:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]. *'''Dec 9''' – The [[Wikipedia:Field Museum of Natural History|Field Museum]] in [[Wikipedia:Chicago|Chicago]] holds a symposium titled "The Stories Behind ''Star Wars'' and ''Sue'': Envisioning Environments in Film and at The Field" in 2000. *'''Dec 13''' – ''[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy]]'' received the "best video game based on a TV show or movie" at the [[Wikipedia:Spike (TV channel)|Spike TV]] Video Game Awards in 2006.
